title: botrychium ternatum f. oneidense
intro: Botrychium ternatum f. oneidense, also known as one-sided fern, is a type of rare, terrestrial fern belonging to the family Ophioglossaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Botrychium ternatum f. oneidense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
